title: Project Brutality
description: A community-driven branch of Brutal Doom that expands the weapon roster, adds more enemy variants, and offers a wider set of customization options. Often preferred over vanilla Brutal Doom for its modular feel and ongoing development.
notes: [GitHub](https://github.com/pa1nki113r/Project_Brutality) • [ModDB](https://www.moddb.com/mods/project-brutality) • Staging build mirrored on archive.org. GZDoom only.
